programmes.show_description: Programmes Start at 07:00.
The Earthworms: Tiny Toot, Pixie and Gato pay a visit to the earthworms in Grandma's vegetable patch.
The Tadpoles: Pixie takes Tiny Toot and Gato for a walk to a small lake with tadpoles.
A sleepover in Dad's should be straight forward , however Punky needs everything just right.
Library: When Muffin is told that she is special by her dad, she interprets it as an excuse to do anything she wants, which means playing Bluey and Bingo's game of library her way.
Dylan the Magician wants to do the biggest magic trick ever, but when he makes everyone disappear, he has to figure out how to bring them all back!
Dylan the Train Conductor wants to pick up all his passenger friends and take their tickets - but one of his friends is waiting where there are no tracks!
Daniel and his friends learn more about their favorite Neighborhood Trolley!
While the other Atoms struggle to stay awake during a meteor shower, Hydrogen stargazes with Park Ranger Iron and learns some mind-blowing secrets of the universe.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'c', and we go on an adventure around the sound. We see some cute coconuts, a camper van, and meet a cool camel!
Glitch gets into a mountain of trouble, as the Go Jetters attempt to climb the Matterhorn.
Ricky's Fired Up Part 1: Animated comedy following the adventures of a red rescue motorcycle.
Deedee takes a break: Deedee is so busy at her juice bar that she can't come up with any new cocktails. To help her unwind, Ollie and Titus give her a hot air balloon.
Happy Birthday, Bradbury!: Mr. and Ms. Woodley have run out of ideas to make Bradbury's birthday special and worry they won't be able to make him happy.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: The Case of the Missing Mushroom: The Fur Taxi friends are watching a new episode of Gunnar the Gumshoe when they suddenly get a call from Gunnar himself!
The Laughter Badge: There are lots of laughs, and one of them, as the Squirrels find out, is very infectious.
The Midnight Badge: Something amazing happens at midnight. The Squirrels try to stay awake to find out what.
As Sonia worries about her Octopus friend, Hugo learns how best to support his cousin. (SL)
When Granny's favourite photo goes missing from the family album, Sonia and Hugo soon discover she had an even more special place for it. (SL)
Joe and Ozzy meet Billy and his Grandad on the way to the Farmer's Market where Joe makes deliveries to the stall holders and picks up a bracelet for Aisling. (SL)
The Earthworms: Tiny Toot, Pixie and Gato pay a visit to the earthworms in Grandma's vegetable patch.
The Tadpoles: Pixie takes Tiny Toot and Gato for a walk to a small lake with tadpoles.
A sleepover in Dad's should be straight forward , however Punky needs everything just right.
The Great Hooperini: Hooper puts on a spectacular magic show. But with so much to do and so little time, can The Great Hooperini put on a magical performance to remember?
Henry meets a friendly Tennis Racket.
Star Chasing: The Game Catchers land on a planet that's like an old video game.
A Very Cute Doll: The Game Catchers arrive on a planet where everything is made of wool!

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: No More Surprises: Percy is upset to find construction is not finished, so Thomas helps him with the work.
The animals are fed up with Mister Witch's bumbling magic. King decides to give him a very difficult magic test, and if he succeeds, he may remain a witch.
Brewster and Maggie are at Ginger's Shadow Show. She wonders 'What are shadows made of?' Brewster takes them to meet Atom Adam who explains to the friends what shadows are.
Carrick is building a hot-air balloon and asks, how do hot air balloons stay up in the sky? The friends meet Muldoon, the hot air balloon.
Fadó fadó, ba hipithe a bhí i Granny agus Grandpa. Úsáideann siad focail hipithe fós ar nós 'grúvaíáilte' agus bíonn Peppa ag gáire.
Tá Peppa agus George ar cuairt ag Granny agus Grandpa Pig. Taispeánann Grandpa a Óstán Feithidí do Peppa agus George atá déanta as seanphíosaí adhmaid agus duilleoga ón ngairdín.
Ceacht Ceoil: Castar grúpa nótaí ceoil trína chéile ar Bhreacaí. Tá a n-eochair caillte.
Léaspáin agus Líníochtaí: Lorgaíonn Breacaí foscadh i gcaisleán ceomhar lán seachmaill. Caithfidh sí a bheith cliste agus cruthaitheach chun éalú ó chleasa mhuintir an tí.
Bóín Dé a Aimsiú: Tá Oona róthinn le dul le Baba, Mossy agus May le bóíní Dé a aimsiú agus socraíonn siad ceann a thabhairt ar ais chuici - ach níl sé furasta greim a fháil ar bhóín Dé.
An bhlaosc is fearr: Nuair a ghlacann Baba leis blaosc ó phluais Bernie gan chead, síleann Bernie gurb iad na portáin dhearga a thóg í agus socraíonn sé labhairt leo.
A Genie appears in the lighthouse. All the friends are granted a wish but things don't turn out how they thought they would.
Yellow Berries Yuck: Reggie is dismayed when he realizes that there are no Red Berries ready for picking. Grace and the others inform him that it's currently the season for Yellow Berries.
Andy Day looks at the one of the largest flying pterosaurs, the Ornithocheirus.
Ricky's Fired Up Part 1: Animated comedy following the adventures of a red rescue motorcycle.

Tá cuireadh tugtha ag Madame Gazelle do Mr Potato babhta traenála ceolmhar a dhéanamh leis na páistí.
Tugann Peppa agus a cairde cuairt ar ionad spraoi Little Cars a bhfuil Miss Rabbit i gceannas air.

programmes.show_name: Nina and the Neurons: Brilliant Bodies
programmes.show_description: Brain: Nina investigates why humans have brains with the help of her five sense neurons.
Mission: Sleepover: Rayane, Karim and Luca are having a sleepover, when hearing dog Diesel is woken in the middle of the night by a strange hissing noise.
BaBa makes friends with a Tweetie. MeMo would like a Tweetie friend too. At Play Time MeMo befriends a new toy, MeMo Dog. Yummy Dog also wants to be MeMo Dog's friend.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Hedgie Kitty Continued: The Narrator's kitten is back and Pins and Nettie still have a hard time dealing with her.
It's Time for a Folk Tale: JoJo & Gran Gran are with Cynthia and the Nature Club to hear a special folk tale from a special person.
It's Time to Braid Hair: At Charlene's hair salon, JoJo sees a picture of a girl with hair braids - can Gran Gran braid her hair? It's time for a Gran Gran plan with some help from Charlene.
Banana: Live from the Roots and Fruits Theatre, it's Banana revealing an astonishing secret about herself in the opera piece, I've Got a Secret.
Pumpkin: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Pumpkin demonstrating incredible strength and attempting to break a Roots and Fruits record.
Wild Guy lets his imagination run WILD when he convinces himself (and others) that there are some ginormous visitors in Bright's Park.
Phoenix eagerly joins in some Puffin Practice with Oona, Isabelle and Baba but doubts himself when he can't do everything they can.
On a stormy day, Oona and Baba find Mossy and the Shrew Crew hiding from the thunder and lightning.
Doodle Girl comes across a crumpled sketchbook page. She's never doodled with something this messy before! Where to start?
The Chatty Library: The Mixmups mix up a Chatty Library adventure so that they can listen to some real talking books.
Zigzag's No Poo Problem: When Zigzag hasn't had a poo in two days, Vida sets up a scavenger hunt full of clues to help her go.
Pippen's Stomach Bug: When her brother has a stomach bug, Pippen is afraid to catch it because she doesn't like bugs!
Transportation: Ms Kashani leads a road rally where the Dream Factory Crew get to demonstrate their navigation skills.
Disappearing Pigeons: The Dream Factory Crew builds a pigeon coop to house a bunch of wandering pigeons that have 'invaded' the Dream Factory.
Competition between Norman and Derek to make the best stone age shelter goes too far and causes a fire on Pontypandy Island.
It's the opening of the New Fire Station and Norman hasn't got his Pioneer uniform ready. Dilys rushes to iron it, but the old iron she uses causes a fire.
Joe & Ozzy are going to the Sports Centre to make some deliveries and to play some games. (SL)
Joe & Ozzy go to the Farm to make some special deliveries to the farm animals. (SL)

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Winter Games: Sodor is in a flurry of snow and excitement as the island welcomes ski jumpers and snowboarders to participate in the Winter Games.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: The Accidental Bad Guy: Thomas is given a super task for the day - delivering boxcars full of the latest edition of Ultratrain and the Carriages of Justice.
Andy And The Chimps: When Andy loses some kapok tree seeds that Mr Hammond was hoping to plant in the chimp enclosure, it's up to Andy to jet off to Africa and track down some more.
To avoid Mrs. Nolan boasting about a trophy she won for best cake, Cranky pretends to be ill. Along comes Doctor Punky, with her doctor's bag. She knows what's best for Cranky?
Tá Hugo agus Sonia ag iarraidh mealbhacán uisce foirfe a phiocadh don chlann.
Níl Sonia ná Hugo in ann na réaltaí a fheiceáil sa spéir ach feiceann siad rud éigin aoibhinn eile.
Lily finds a cookie cutter on the beach, and thinks it would be a good idea to open a food stall at the Driftwood Bay harbour.
A huge statue hurtles out of control after a disaster near Stag Castle.
Lá breá gréine eile é i mBaile Gach Aon Lá.... is tá Mya ag súgradh lena cairde sa ghairdín tosaigh. Ó, seo chugainn Peigí Pór.
Pre-animation series following a little girl called Mya, who has a lot of infectious enthusiasm a fearless sense of adventure and shouts catchphrases such as Mya Go! and Maya Play!.

It's too hot for Nelly and Nora, who yearn for rain.
On a day when everything is going wrong, Kiva, Saul and Angus find a clever way to cheer Nanni up.
The Wee Little must reunite three ants with their family after they follow Jeremy home by accident.
Hedgie Kitty Continued: The Narrator's kitten is back and Pins and Nettie still have a hard time dealing with her.
Henry visits the Pet Groomers with his pet dog. There he meets a Brush. It's the day of the Big Pet Show but the Pet Groomer had to go home as they were allergic to cats!
